message.content:
In the bottom-right corner of the video frame, there is text that reads "JARIYAH NOW". It appears as a **solid opaque text label** (not semi-transparent or a watermark).  

The background image is a **mountain landscape**—specifically, a scenic view of rugged, jagged mountain peaks with a sunrise/sunset casting warm light, surrounded by clouds/fog. It is not a mosque silhouette.
